title: Black Diamonds: Mountaintop Removal & the Fight for Coalfield Justice
original_title: Black Diamonds: Mountaintop Removal & the Fight for Coalfield Justice
overview: "Black Diamonds: Mountaintop Removal and the Fight for Coalfield Justice" is an award-winning feature documentary exploring radical community resistance to the explosive rise of mountaintop removal coal mines in Appalachian states.
